mapper.select: SELECT id, itinerary_id AS itineraryId, spot_id AS spotId, spot_name AS spotName, username, vote_type AS voteType, reason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM itinerary_spot_vote WHERE itinerary_id = #{itineraryId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, itinerary_id AS itineraryId, spot_id AS spotId, spot_name AS spotName, username, vote_type AS voteType, reason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM itinerary_spot_vote WHERE itinerary_id = #{itineraryId} AND spot_id = #{spotId} AND username = #{username}
